chunks.title: Call to Attention and Locust Description
chunks.reason: The prophet introduces the message and describes the sequential devastation of the locust plague.

chunks.title: Call to Lament for Agricultural Loss
chunks.reason: A series of commands directed at drunkards, farmers, and vinedressers mourning the destruction of crops.

chunks.title: Call to Priestly Fasting and Assembly
chunks.reason: Instructions for priests to lead a solemn fast and assembly due to the cessation of temple offerings.

chunks.title: Prayer for Mercy Amidst Drought
chunks.reason: A personal cry to Yahweh describing the suffering of beasts and the drying up of water sources.
